subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! The letter which thou didst send in the name of Mihdi-'Ali, upon him be My glory, hath attained unto Our presence. That which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی نامه که باسمی مهدی علیه بهائی ارسال نمودی بشرف حضور فائز آنچه در او
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @naming of children; of individuals, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
